title: TitaniumThings
body:
TitaniumThings Mod adds in Titanium ores,Titanium ores can be found in the world.Titanium Ores have their own unique tools, weapons and armour sets.

![All Item It Adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGvy09Ut/images/25673e35b10213fe89b33b964adf30af02666d19.png)

![Titanium Ore In Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/432dc4a30b52e3544abf4cbe202ac292ad61af10.png)

![DeepSlate Titanium Ore In Deep Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc3ffa77106a1b4d1df7de739047849107849ce.png)
